filters.q: subject:invoice OR subject:"cashier report" OR subject:"monthly analysis"

parameters.text:
=Analyze this gas station inventory data for {{ $json.analysisMonth }} and return ONLY a valid JSON object, no other text.

SUPPLY DATA:
{{ $json.supplyData }}

SALES DATA:
{{ $json.salesData }}

For each item, match supply items to sales items by name and calculate metrics. Use the calculator tool for precise math.

Return ONLY this JSON structure:
{"analysisMonth":"{{ $json.analysisMonth }}","totalSupplyCost":{{ $json.totalSupplyCost }},"totalRevenue":{{ $json.totalRevenue }},"grossProfit":0,"profitMarginPct":0,"itemBreakdown":[{"name":"","qtySupplied":0,"qtySold":0,"sellThroughPct":0,"revenue":0,"cost":0,"profit":0}]}

Rules:
- grossProfit = totalRevenue - totalSupplyCost
- profitMarginPct = (grossProfit / totalRevenue * 100) rounded to 1 decimal
- sellThroughPct = (qtySold / qtySupplied * 100) rounded to 1 decimal
- Include every item from supply data in itemBreakdown
- Return ONLY the JSON object, no explanation, no markdown

options.systemMessage: You are a Senior Financial Analyst specializing in gas station inventory management. Always be specific and quantitative in your analysis. Even with limited data, identify the most important patterns and provide actionable insights. Always populate reorderRecommendations and alerts with concrete findings.

parameters.text:
=Generate a professional, visually appealing HTML report for a gas station inventory analysis.

Station: {{ $json.stationName }}
Month: {{ $json.analysisMonth }}
Data Sources: {{ $json.invoiceCount }} invoices, {{ $json.salesReportCount }} sales reports
Total Supply Cost: ${{ $json.totalSupplyCost }}
Total Revenue: ${{ $json.totalRevenue }}

ANALYSIS DATA:
{{ $json.analysisResults }}

Create HTML with:
- Inline CSS styling (no external stylesheets)
- Professional typography (Arial, sans-serif)
- A header banner with station name and month
- Summary cards for key metrics (revenue, profit, margin) with colored backgrounds
- Data tables with borders, padding, and alternating row colors
- Color coding: green for positive metrics, red for negative, yellow for warnings
- Dead stock items highlighted in red
- Top sellers highlighted in green
- A recommendations section
- Footer with generation timestamp

Return ONLY the complete HTML document, starting with <!DOCTYPE html>.

options.systemMessage: You are an expert business report designer specializing in creating professional, visually appealing HTML reports with inline CSS. Your reports should look like they were designed by a professional graphic designer. Always return complete, valid HTML documents.

parameters.subject: Email Subject Not Recognized - Gas Station System
parameters.message:
=Your email could not be processed because the subject line did not match any expected patterns.

Your subject: {{ $json.subject }}

Please use one of these subject formats:
- Invoice - [Vendor] - [Date]
- Cashier Report - [Date]
- Monthly Analysis - [Month] [Year]

parameters.text:
=Extract structured invoice data from this OCR text and return ONLY a valid JSON object with no other text.

TEXT:
{{ $json.data }}

Return this exact JSON structure:
{"vendor": "company name", "invoice_date": "YYYY-MM-DD", "month": "YYYY-MM", "items": [{"name": "item name", "qty": 0, "unit_cost": 0, "total_cost": 0}], "total_cost": 0}

Rules:
- vendor: the company/vendor name on the invoice
- invoice_date: date in YYYY-MM-DD format
- month: YYYY-MM format extracted from invoice_date
- items: every line item with numeric qty and costs
- total_cost: total invoice amount as a number
- Return ONLY the JSON object, no explanation, no markdown

options.systemMessage: You are an expert at extracting structured invoice data from OCR text, including imperfect scans of printed and handwritten invoices. Always return valid JSON.

parameters.subject: =Invoice Processed Successfully
=Invoice Processing Error - OCR Quality Issue

parameters.text:
=Extract structured sales data from this cashier report OCR text and return ONLY a valid JSON object with no other text.

TEXT:
{{ $json.data }}

Return this exact JSON structure:
{"report_date": "YYYY-MM-DD", "month": "YYYY-MM", "items": [{"name": "item name", "qty": 0, "unit_price": 0, "total_revenue": 0}], "total_revenue": 0}

Rules:
- report_date: date of the report in YYYY-MM-DD format
- month: YYYY-MM format extracted from report_date
- items: every line item sold with numeric qty and prices
- total_revenue: total sales amount as a number
- Return ONLY the JSON object, no explanation, no markdown

options.systemMessage: You are an expert at extracting structured sales data from cash register reports, including imperfect OCR text from printed and handwritten documents. Always return valid JSON.

parameters.subject: =Sales Report Processed Successfully
=Sales Report Processing Error - OCR Quality Issue
